message:
test(btree): simplify cached-rightmost-leaf split test and remove instrumentation coupling

Rename test to test_table_try_append_cached_rightmost_leaf_hint_handles_split_fallback
to better describe what it actually verifies. Remove btree_copy_profile
instrumentation assertions that coupled the test to internal cell
assembly call counting — the test's purpose is to verify that the
cached-hint append path correctly handles page splits by falling back
to the standard insert, not to audit per-row assembly call counts.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
